attributes.style: margin: 0px 14px 18px; height: 160px; border-radius: 12px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(238, 234, 224) 0px, rgb(238, 234, 224) 10px, rgb(250, 248, 242) 10px, rgb(250, 248, 242) 20px); border: 1px solid rgb(234, 230, 221); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: rgb(138, 133, 123); font-family: "JetBrains Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px;

computed.fontFamily: "JetBrains Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, monospace
